prompt_raw: Create a premium “BEARD STYLE ANALYSIS” poster featuring the same man from the reference image. Show face shape, beard density, jawline definition, beard growth pattern, and beard suitability score. Include different beard styles comparison such as Stubble, Short Boxed Beard, Full Beard, Goatee, Van Dyke, Clean Shave. Add side profile and front profile views. Modern dark blue luxury background, professional grooming infographic style, high detail, realistic face consistency, stylish typography, premium male grooming poster.
